overall.description: Gameplay footage from a third-person perspective showing a character in a yellow jacket exploring a luxury rooftop pool area. The character walks through an elegant marble interior corridor, exits onto a sunny rooftop terrace with a swimming pool and BBQ area, briefly enters the water, and returns indoors. The setting appears to be a high-end urban residential building or hotel with neoclassical architectural elements.

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a luxurious interior corridor with marble floors and classical columns. Other pedestrians are visible ahead as the character approaches a bright arched exit leading to the rooftop.

segments.scene_description: The character emerges onto a sunny rooftop terrace with a large swimming pool. The scene includes a BBQ area where a man is grilling, people lounging on outdoor furniture, and city views in the background. The bright sunlight creates strong shadows on the tiled deck.

character exits the water via metal stairs and continues walking on dry surface

segments.scene_description: The character walks along the pool edge, passing sunbathers and approaching the shallow end. The character steps into the water, wades through the shallow area, and exits via metal stairs while the building entrance becomes visible in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: interior hallway with archways and potted plants

agents.ego_description: exiting the pool area and walking back into the interior corridor, passing other guests

segments.scene_description: The character leaves the rooftop pool behind and re-enters the building through an arched doorway. Back in the shaded interior, the character walks through a marble corridor with chandeliers and potted plants, passing other guests standing near the entrance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a shaded, neoclassical interior out into a brilliant rooftop oasis before returning to the cool marble halls. It begins inside a luxurious corridor with classical columns and marble floors, moving toward a bright arched exit where other pedestrians are visible. As the character emerges from the archway, the scene opens into a sun-drenched rooftop terrace featuring a large swimming pool, a BBQ area with a grill, and expansive city views under strong sunlight. The camera then follows the character along the tiled deck and into the shallow water of the pool, wading briefly before exiting via metal stairs. Finally, the movement turns back toward the building, passing through the arched doorway to return to the shaded interior of the marble corridor adorned with chandeliers and potted plants.
